message:
fix: validate newName in crew Rename() to reject invalid names (gt-gt3zv)

Add validateCrewName(newName) as the first check in Manager.Rename() to
prevent path traversal, hyphens, dots, spaces, and reserved words in
crew names. Also add errors.Is(err, crew.ErrInvalidCrewName) handling in
runCrewRename() for better user-facing error messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
